description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a polymer frame and a metal slide. The grip is ergonomically contoured with a textured surface for secure handling, and the trigger guard is robust and slightly squared. The slide has serrations at the rear for improved manipulation and a rail system on top for mounting accessories. Several brass-colored cartridges are displayed alongside the handgun, indicating its use with centerfire ammunition. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, contributing to a streamlined profile.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, metal slide, and several brass cartridges nearby.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, including the grip texture, slide serrations, and cartridges laid out in front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the checkered backstrap of the grip and the alignment of cartridges on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour, slide details, and cartridges, mirroring the first side but from the left.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, barrel opening, and the arrangement of cartridges directly in front of the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and a checkered texture for enhanced traction. It appears to be made of matte black polymer, providing a non-slip surface. The backstrap is visibly checkered, and the sides have stippling for additional grip security. There are subtle finger grooves molded into the front of the grip, and the overall shape is slightly flared at the base for better control. No visible logos or embellishments are present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared with a gentle undercut at the rear for improved finger placement. It is thick and solid, providing ample protection for the trigger. The front of the guard is smooth, with no visible texturing or accessory rail, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and has a round profile with no visible threading or porting. The muzzle is clean and unadorned, with no compensators or suppressor threads. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no visible markings or external features on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features minimal markings, with a small rectangular area on the left side that may indicate a manufacturer logo or model number, though it is not clearly legible. There are no prominent engravings, serial numbers, or decorative patterns visible. The slide is otherwise smooth with rear serrations for grip.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, contributing to a streamlined and compact profile. There are no finger rests, flares, or extensions visible, and the base appears to be made of the same matte black polymer as the grip. No logos or texturing are present on the magazine floorplate.
